name: Fontina Cheese and Sweet Red Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: Head iceberg lettuce -- torn into bite-size pieces
1 small Bunch green onions - finely sliced
4 oz Italian fontina cheese - cubed (approx. 1 cup)
8 oz Jar roasted, sweet red Peppers - cut into 1/4-in-wide slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a vinaigrette dressing by combining red-wine vinegar, mustard and fresh ground pepper in a small bowl. Gradually add olive oil while beating or whisking constantly until emulsified.
2. In a large bowl, toss lettuce with onions, chives, celery, anchovies and vinaigrette dressing.
3. Place equal portions of this mixture on each salad plate.
4. Place cheese cubes in the center of the salad.
5. Arrange pepper slices around the cheese.
